# TierList

## Summary
The `TierList` card lets users create and manage a tier-based ranking system. It provides a visual interface for dragging items into different tiers, tools for customizing the tiers, and a built-in "Generate with AI" action that builds the pool of rankable items in place. Everything lives on a single card — there is no separate template to create or link.

## Import
```javascript
import { TierList } from '../tier-list';
```

## Fields
- `title` — the list's display title.
- `items` — `linksToMany(CardDef)`: the pool of rankable items. Can hold ANY card type; each renders via its own `fitted` view. Populate it with "Generate with AI" in edit mode (which mints TierItem cards), or link any existing cards.
- `tiers` — `containsMany(Tier)`: the tier bands. Defaults to a standard S/A/B/C/D/F set; add/rename/recolor/remove them in edit mode.
- `placements` — `containsMany(Placement)`: where each item is ranked, keyed by the item's card id so dragging never mutates the linked item cards.

## Views
- **Isolated (list) view** — read-only tier bands; drag items from the unranked tray into tiers. Focused on ranking.
- **Edit view** — the same board, extended with tier editing, AI generation, and a per-tile remove button, plus a panel to link any existing card.
